content.full_text:
State of California

Memorandum

To      : Opinion Request Meeting Participants          Date  : Dec. 6, 1976

From  : FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
        Ken Finney

Subject: Item for Discussion


        Whether a return received from
        the Keogh Plan is income.


Disregard the Plan and report as an
individual. Thus, not income because
interest from time deposit
